cancel_cancelIntro: To cancel your reservation please write your cancellation reason then click « Cancel my reservation »
cancel_managementIntro: Here you can manage your reservation at
cancel_managementSummary: Below you'll find a summary of your reservation.
cancel_modifyIntro: To modify your reservation, click the button below:
cancel_notAllowed: This reservation cannot be canceled online. Please contact the restaurant.
cancel_lateWarningBody: The cancellation window has closed. You can still cancel. If a card imprint was authorized for your booking, the restaurant may charge it.
cancel_lateWarningHeading: You are cancelling past the deadline
cancel_reasonPlaceholder: Tell the restaurant why you're cancelling
cancel_reasonRequired: Please share a brief reason for cancelling.
common_modificationBanner: Editing your reservation for {date} at {time} for {pax} guest(s)
contact_preauthNotice: This reservation requires a card pre-authorization. No charge will be made.
contact_rememberMeHelper: Your information is stored only on this device.
contact_waitlistNotice: You'll be added to the waitlist for this slot
done_cardAuthorized: Card authorized — you'll receive an email confirmation shortly.
done_emailIncoming: You'll receive a summary of your booking by email in a few moments.
done_emailSent: An email has been sent to {email}.
done_toConfirmBody: The restaurant needs to confirm your request. You'll get an email as soon as it's approved.
done_waitlistBody: You're on the waitlist. We'll let you know as soon as a spot opens up.
error_generic:
An error occurred during booking.
Please try again.
error_modificationNotAllowed: This slot is not available for modification. Please choose a different slot.
error_reservationNotFound: This reservation could not be found.
leaveReview_apology: We're sorry your experience didn't meet your expectations.
manage_modifyNotAllowed: This reservation cannot be modified online. Please contact the restaurant.
manage_pastBooking: This reservation is in the past.
manage_terminalStatus: This reservation can no longer be modified or canceled.
payment_bookingReconfirmFailed: The payment was authorized but the reservation could not be finalized. Please contact the restaurant.
payment_createBookingFailed: The reservation could not be finalized. Please contact the restaurant.
payment_preAuthIntro: To confirm your reservation, we securely save your card. No charge will be made now — we will only charge {amount} if you don't show up or cancel late.
payment_reservationNotFound: Reservation not found. Please contact the restaurant.
payment_reservationPayloadMissing: Reservation not found. Please start over.
reconfirm_alreadyProcessed: This reservation has already been processed.
reconfirm_autoCancelWarning: Without your confirmation, the restaurant reserves the right to cancel your reservation.
reconfirm_cannotModify: This reservation can no longer be modified.
reconfirm_clickBelow: Click the buttons below to let us know:
reconfirm_forMoreInfo: For more info, contact us at
reconfirm_genericError: An error occurred. Please try again.
reconfirm_thanksForLettingUsKnow: Thank you for letting us know.
reconfirm_thanksForReconfirming: Thank you for reconfirming your reservation!
selection_noTablesTryAnotherDate: No tables available. Try another date.
selection_groupContactNotice: For group requests of more than {maxPax} guests, please contact us at {contactInfo}.
selection_paxLockedByPayment: The number of guests cannot be changed because a card pre-authorization has been placed. Please contact the restaurant at {phone} or by email at {email}.
standalonePayment_authorizationNotice: Your card is securely saved and will only be charged this amount in case of no-show or late cancellation.
standalonePayment_emailConfirmation: A confirmation email has been sent to {email}
